input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.1.2
            TITLE: technical inspectors will not inspect any vehicle presented for inspection in an unfinished

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.1.2: Technical inspectors will not inspect any vehicle presented for inspection in an unfinished
IN.2.1.2 Technical inspectors will not inspect any vehicle presented for inspection in an unfinished 
state.

final_answer: Technical inspectors will not inspect any vehicle presented for inspection in an unfinished state.
